description: JavaScript vector and measurement marker API functions available inside p5sheet scripts. pvector creates transformable and animatable 2D vectors. distanceMarker, curveMarker, and angleMarker draw measurement annotations. NOT standalone expressions.
utility: Draw vectors and measurement markers inside p5sheet scripts

alternates.syntax: let v = pvector(x1, y1, x2, y2)
alternates.description: Creates a vector from (x1,y1) to (x2,y2). Properties: .x1, .y1, .x2, .y2. Geometric: .magnitude(), .angle(). Drawing: .draw(options), .drawAnimated(t, options) where t is 0-1 progress. Transformations (return new pvector): .placeAt(x, y), .forward(distance), .parallelShift(distance), .reverse(), .reverseAt(x, y), .chain(other), .add(other), .subtract(other), .scale(scalar). Animated transitions: .drawPlaceAt(x, y, t, options), .drawForward(dist, t, options), .drawParallelShift(dist, t, options), .drawChain(other, t, options). Draw options: { strokeWeight, color }.

Draws a straight distance marker between two points with optional arrows and label. Options: { markerLength (tick size), arrowAt ('start'|'end'|'both'), label (text to display), buff (offset from line), strokeWeight, textSize }.
Draws a curved arc marker between two points. Options: { radius, arrowAt ('start'|'end'|'both'), sweepType ('min'|'max'), reflex (boolean), label, buff, strokeWeight, textSize }.

alternates.syntax: angleMarker(vx, vy, p1x, p1y, p2x, p2y, options)
alternates.description: Draws an angle marker at vertex (vx,vy) between rays to point1 and point2. Options: { radius, arrowAt ('start'|'end'|'both'), label, buff, strokeWeight, fill, fillOpacity, type ('interior'|'right'|'exterior-first'|'exterior-second'|'reflex'|'opposite'), textSize }.
